resumeText: Frontend engineer with 4 years building web apps. Shipped a customer portal in React and TypeScript, backed by a PostgreSQL database. Wrote unit tests and reviewed pull requests.
Built and maintained UIs in React. Set up GitHub Actions pipelines that automatically test and deploy the app on every merge. Containerised services with Docker for local development.
Backend developer. Wrote Node.js services exposing RESTful web endpoints consumed by mobile clients. Stored documents in MongoDB and tuned queries.
Data scientist proficient in Python. Trained and evaluated deep learning models for image classification and deployed them on Amazon Web Services using SageMaker.
Platform engineer. Wrote microservices in Go and deployed them to a Kubernetes cluster. Owned Helm charts and cluster upgrades.
DevOps engineer. Packaged apps with Docker, orchestrated them with k8s, and managed cloud infra as code using Terraform.
Software engineer with 5 years in Java. Built REST services with Spring Boot and wrote complex SQL queries against a relational database.
Frontend developer specialising in Vue. Made sure every screen met WCAG standards and was usable with a screen reader. Fetched data through a GraphQL API.
Backend engineer focused on distributed systems in Go and Python. No mobile development experience.
Full-stack engineer. Built a Next.js app in TypeScript, modelled the database with Prisma, and cached hot paths in an in-memory store. No Redis specifically but used Memcached.
SRE with strong Linux fundamentals. Instrumented services with Prometheus metrics and Grafana dashboards to monitor latency and errors. Automated runbooks in Python.
Data engineer. Wrote SQL transformations and built data pipelines that extract, transform, and load records nightly, orchestrated with Apache Airflow.
